subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Grant shelter unto this helpless servant in Thy mighty stronghold and beneath Thy lofty protection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار اين بنده درمانده را در کهف منيعت مأوی  ده و در ملاذ رفيعت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
